vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Adequate cooling airflow through motor pod
Bay door opens and closes smoothly

verify.value: All required fields present and valid.
verify.rule: Ensure all necessary parts of the blueprint are included.
Ensure the total mass does not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All physical features are mapped to specific geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each physical feature must correspond to a geometry operation.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocated with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be clearly defined and matched between subsystems.

verify.value: Visible locking methods and preload intents are specified for critical joints.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the equipment bay door hinge point due to thin material.
risk.mit: Increase material thickness at the hinge point or reinforce with additional stiffeners.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow if the cooling inlet is obstructed.
risk.mit: Include a secondary cooling path and ensure unobstructed access to the inlet.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between FDM and foam core materials may affect fit and finish.
risk.mit: Conduct a detailed tolerance analysis and adjust manufacturing strategy accordingly.

risk.desc: Process limitations of FDM may lead to internal voids or porosity in critical areas.
risk.mit: Implement post-processing steps to address any internal defects identified during inspection.

risk.desc: Overclaiming the strength of the motor mount may result in unexpected failure under load.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis and validate the motor mount's strength through testing.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.path: Wing spar reinforcement -> Center body pod -> Motor pod
Cooling air inlet -> Motor pod cooling channel -> Exhaust outlet
Motor heat -> Cooling fins -> Ambient air

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface defects, dimensional checks

verification_focus.requirement: Adequate cooling airflow through motor pod
Bay door opens and closes smoothly

verify.rule: All required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between CFRP and EPP foam.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests to validate material compatibility.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient load path continuity if ribs and spars are not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Ensure ribs and spars are designed with proper fittings and connections.

risk.desc: Risk of improper alignment during assembly due to hidden spar alignment evidence.
risk.mit: Maintain visibility of spar sockets, anti-rotation keys, and center datum throughout assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of service access being obstructed if battery access cutouts are too small.
risk.mit: Verify cutout dimensions allow easy access for battery replacement.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal dissipation failure if cooling vents are blocked or improperly sized.
risk.mit: Ensure cooling vents are unobstructed and correctly sized for effective heat dissipation.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers lift and landing loads from wing skin to fuselage frames via ribs and spars.
Heat generated by sun exposure is dissipated through cooling vents.
Access for battery replacement and maintenance.

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces, rail guides, axis rings, spar sockets, or mating pads
